name: french-training
description: Écoute — an installable French sound trainer: a lesson-by-lesson course with spaced review, a microphone + Gemini pronunciation grader, and daily push reminders from Rémy.

scripts.icons: magick -background none remy.svg -resize 192x192 icons/icon-192.png && magick -background none remy.svg -resize 512x512 icons/icon-512.png && magick -background none remy.svg -resize 180x180 -background '#7c8cff' -flatten icons/apple-touch-icon.png && magick -size 512x512 xc:'#7c8cff' \( -background none remy.svg -resize 410x410 \) -gravity center -composite icons/icon-maskable-512.png && magick -background none badge.svg -resize 96x96 icons/badge-96.png

author: Jeremy Dahan
